item.title: Web scraping with go and go-colly
item.description: In this post, I will show you how to use Go and colly for web scraping by trying to scrape the frontpage of a popular Nigerian forum called Nairaland. Web Scraping Web scraping is a form of data extraction that basically extracts data from websites. A web scraper is usually a bot that uses the HTTP protocol to access websites, extract HTML elements from them and use the data for various purposes.

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, my name is Damilola Dolor and I am a software developer based in Lagos Nigeria. I am currently not employed 😭 and open to opportunities both remote and on-site 😂. Being self-taught for the most part, I have been able to gather skills required to build web applications some of which are listed my portfolio. I mostly work with Javascript, Python and Go, and open to learning relevant skills, using the best tools to approach a problem.

item.title: Contact me
item.description: You can reach me through any the following channels: Email Twitter Github

item.title: Projects
item.description: Here is a list of some of projects I have worked on. A mini forum A forum site where users can create posts, comment on a post, like posts etc. This was built using Go and Gin framework, backed by MongoDB. View source code An image sharing platform An image sharing site, kind of like a lazy clone of imgur. This was built using Javascript + MongoDB.
